source.sqlReaderQuery:
select 
CAST(L.EntryDate as DATE) as EntryDate
,CAST((CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NULL THEN L.ApptDate ELSE J.ContractDate END) as Date) as ApptDateFinal
,CASE WHEN L.LeadID IS NULL THEN'0' ELSE '1' END as RawLead_Num
,CASE WHEN L.EverSet='TRUE' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END as Set_Num
,CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID,2)='-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID,1)='-' THEN NULL ELSE L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END) IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE CASE WHEN L.EverSat=1 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END END as Demo_Flag
,CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID,2)='-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID,1)='-' THEN NULL ELSE L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END) IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE CASE WHEN L.EverNetIssued=1 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END END as NetIssue_Flag
,CONCAT(E.FirstName,' ',E.LastName) as PromoterName
,CONCAT(E1.FirstName,' ',E1.LastName) as SalesRep
,L.BranchID
,L.ProductID
,L.LeadSubSourceID
,L.LeadID
,CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN J.JobNetAmt>0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE J.GrossAmount END)>0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END as Sold_Flag
,CASE WHEN J.JobNetAmt>0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE J.GrossAmount END as GrossSalesAmt 
,CASE WHEN RIGHT(ISNULL(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1),1)='1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END as Backlog_Flag
,CASE WHEN RIGHT(ISNULL(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1),1)='5' AND (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END as BTD_Flag
,CASE WHEN RIGHT(ISNULL(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1),1)='5' THEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) ELSE '0' END as BTD_Amt
,CASE WHEN RIGHT(ISNULL(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1),1)='3' AND (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END as Cancel_Flag
,CASE WHEN RIGHT(ISNULL(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1),1)='3' THEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) ELSE '0' END as Cancel_Amt
,J.ContractDate
,J.ContractID
,ML.MSRDate
,ML.ORDDate
,ML.RCVDate
,ML.STRDate,
ML.RevenueDate
,ML.Aging
,J.FinanceAmount
,J.ProductionBranchID
,I.Name as Installer_Name
,JS.JobStatus
,M.Market_OpCo_Reporting as Market_OpCo_Reporting_lds
,M.BranchName as BranchName_lds
,P.TX_Product_Reporting as Product_OpCo_Reporting_lds
,P.ProductName as ProductName_lds
,SM.LeadSubSource as SubSource_lds
,SM.SourceGroup as SourceGroup_lds
,SM.SourceCode as Source3_lds
,MG.Market_OpCo_Reporting as Market_OpCo_Reporting_job
,MG.BranchName as BranchName_job
,MP.TX_Product_Reporting as Product_OpCo_Reporting_job
,MP.ProductName as ProductName_job
from EDW.FACT_LEAD L left join EDW.FACT_JOB J on L.LeadID=J.LeadID
left join EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E on L.PromoterID=E.EmployeeID
left join EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E1 on L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID=E1.EmployeeID
left join EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS on JS.JobStatusID=J.JobStatusID
left join RDM.REF_MKTNG_MARKET_GROUP M on M.BranchID=L.BranchID
left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_PRODUCT_MAPPING P on P.ProductID=L.ProductID
left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING SM on SM.LeadSubSourceID=L.LeadSubSourceID
left join RDM.REF_MKTNG_MARKET_GROUP MG on MG.BranchID=J.ProductionBranchID
left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_PRODUCT_MAPPING MP on MP.ProductID=J.ProductID
left join EDW.DIM_INSTALLER I on I.InstallerID=J.InstallerID_1
left JOIN (Select JobID
,CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-5','HSI-M','PBC-F','RTW-M','FHI-T','MAC-M','MXH-M','PHI-T') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END AS MSRDate
,CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-O','HSI-O','PBC-O','RTW-O','RTW-G','FHI-O','MAC-O','MXH-O','PHI-O') THEN MAX(CAST(ActualDate AS DATE)) OVER (PARTITION BY JobID) END AS ORDDate
,CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-8','HSI-F','PBC-V','RTW-2','RTW-K','FHI-V','FHI-Z','MAC-V','MXH-V','PHI-V') THEN MAX(CAST(ActualDate AS DATE)) OVER (PARTITION BY JobID) END RCVDate
,CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-S','HSI-S','PBC-S','RTW-S','FHI-S','MAC-S','MAC-K','MXH-S','PHI-S') THEN MAX(CAST(ActualDate AS DATE)) OVER (PARTITION BY JobID) END STRDate
,CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END AS RevenueDate
,CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END) IS NULL THEN ''
WHEN DATEDIFF(day,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END)) BETWEEN 0 and 30 THEN '0-30 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF(day,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END)) BETWEEN 31 and 60 THEN '31-60 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF(day,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END)) BETWEEN 61 and 90 THEN '61-90 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF(day,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END)) BETWEEN 91 and 180 THEN '91-180 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF(day,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C') THEN CAST(ActualDate AS DATE) END)) BETWEEN 181 and 360 THEN '181-360 Days'
ELSE '361+ Days' END as Aging
FROM
EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL) ML ON ML.JOBID=J.JOBID 
where CAST(L.EntryDate as DATE)>=DATEADD(m,-6,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
